messages.message: It will always have to come from him, however. What I know for a fact is that right now he is regretful. Regretful because he kind of spoiled the situation. And he doesn't want to open than can of worms. Intimidation is another word for admiration, which makes me think he sees me as very valuable.

messages.message: I could go on about his psychology for ages...it's fascinating. Being so drawn to someone, so inspired, yet making so many mistakes. One mistake was involving others, I'm pretty sure. But it is what it is.

messages.message: If the main problem is external social pressure...clearly the mistake was involving others. Maybe on my part too, but I wasn't aware. And I assumed benevolence, I usually do. But some people aren't like that. I don't think that's him, though

messages.message:
It is either carrot, or stick, or mix of both. 

There are two cases I am thinking of that map onto what you're describing

- in case 1 it was the man who re-initiated, and it was after he had talked to someone who gave him space to complain, and also see in what ways he failed. So he re-initiated from a place of security 
- in case 2 the man did not re-initiate, he in fact double down for years. it was external force and threat of litigation that forced him to concede and then apologize / admit to the feelings of shame / envy etc

messages.message:
I want his head on our process (our process of declaring psyop, performing psyop, then post morteming it like this, then having others review it)

I want a panel of reviewers who peer review/endorse these things (pre & post). The pre-reviewers might VETO something (or say no this is gonna blow up in a bad way, I suggest XYZ)

messages.message:
I think this was the gov saying "we need to protect our AI companies against China distillation attack" ..?

https://x.com/mkratsios47/status/2079933645888880708

Hmmm Thailand. Isn't that where 47fucb is operating from with his AI stealth lab.

Pretty funny how much computational work is stored in a model and how much it can't be contained since getting the data out is easier than inputing it.

Walter ---

https://arxiv.org/pdf/2607.18450

you need to read this paper re your work - v important
“when i talk to you, it feels like the plaque has been knocked off my brain” -JA
literally so honored to have met this guy. YOU CAN JUST DO THINGS

I enjoyed reading it

and I like how marketable the key concepts are
i guess him talking about the biological stack is new
any idea what to do with it?

I don't know. The thing is this guy supposedly liked me for a long time and wanted to be my friend. He did a lot of things to try to make me happy. I am unsure what is happening to him. I'd like to be a part of his team.

Not sure how threatening him would achieve that.

External force however, I was thinking about it. But in this case it seems like as you said, the external collective he is part of is pressuring him in the wrong way. I wonder if pressuring those would be helpful.

messages.message: @Tim do you have the bandwidth to help me get this ready for an initial week test on Monday?
like we can talk through a version of it on Monday and then invite people the next day

- individual logs don't need to be created, they will be generated automatically (searching "from:defender" or from Walter's app)
- I want ELO ranked logs (bottom floor, some higher floor. All visible, but read-only towards the top)
- I want ephemeral project channels (to move them in and out of an "archived" category at my whim, that I will keep collapsed. People can keep talking in archived channels but it just need sto not be front and center for me / newcomers)
